Hero.titlePeace: board games and joy in the city center
Hero.subtitle: Separé is a small family bar in Mikulandská. A place with an unmistakable genius loci, where people come for honest drinks, pub quizzes, and an atmosphere that makes you forget you're just steps from the busy Národní třída.

About.title: A family joint with living-room energy
About.description: Separé was born from a simple idea: we wanted to create a spot in the heart of Prague where we'd actually want to hang out ourselves. No stiff service, no corporate vibe — just an honest family bar that doubles as a living room for the neighborhood. We're obsessed with real craft and bold flavors. We leave the average to others — if it's on our menu, we'd stake our reputation on it.

beer.title: Craft Beer
beer.text: A carefully curated tap list from small breweries. We rotate regularly so there's always something new to discover.

wine.title: Sparkling Wine & Pet-Nats
wine.text: We go way beyond Italian Prosecco. Expect interesting bubbles and natural wines — best enjoyed when you crack open a whole bottle with friends.

quality.title: Quality Czech Wines
quality.text: Local excellence from trusted winemakers, doing justice to Czech craft. Premium single-vineyard wines carefully guarded in our collection.

games.title: Board Games & Quizzes
games.text: Over 30 games to borrow for free. Regular game nights and our legendary Wednesday pub quizzes. You don't just stop by — you stay.

Menu.title: What's worth drinking and eating
Menu.description: We don't overthink the menu — we just make it honest. We focus on what we love and what gives a laid-back evening with a good crew just the right momentum.
Menu.footnote: Prices and items may change based on current availability.

specials.name: Tap Specials
specials.desc: IPA, APA, sour — always something fresh

sparkling.name: Sparkling Wine
sparkling.desc: Selection from across Europe, always chilled

margherita.name: Pinsa Margherita
margherita.desc: San Marzano, fior di latte, basil

Salonek.description: We're not a sterile boardroom. We have a separate private room with a projector, good food and drinks, and a relaxed atmosphere. Whether it's a birthday, a small company gathering, or just a reserved table for your crew — we tailor everything. We handle light bites in-house and have trusted partners for bigger events.

Reviews.title: Word in the courtyard.
Reviews.description: Separé stands on simple things — good drinks, a warm atmosphere, and people who keep coming back. This is what you write about us. It makes our day.
Reviews.ctaPrompt: Stopped by and had a good time? We'd love a review — it helps us grow.

r1.name: Martin K.
r1.text: Amazing place with a one-of-a-kind atmosphere. The craft beers are excellent, the staff is friendly, and the courtyard garden — a perfect escape from the city center. We come here regularly for the quizzes.

r2.name: Tereza M.
r2.text: Finally a bar where you can actually sit down without noise and queues. Outstanding wine selection, the pet-nats are fantastic. We used the private room for a birthday and it was exactly what we wanted.

r3.name: Jakub P.
r3.text: The best hideaway in Prague. You come for one beer, you leave three hours later with a new favorite board game. The staff is lovely and knows what to recommend. I'll be back.

Moodboard.title: Drop by.
Moodboard.description: A small slice of the Mikulandská atmosphere. The rest is better experienced in person — over a glass of wine or a board game.

photos.p2: Cozy bar interior with warm lighting
photos.p4: Board games spread across the table
photos.p5: Friends at a table with wine
photos.p6: Glass of wine in soft light

Story.title: The 1891 blueprint. And a touch of bureaucracy.
Story.p1: Coincidences don't exist. When we opened Separé in Mikulandská, we had no idea this building had been destined for good drinking since the late 19th century. It took a trip to the old archives to reveal just how close it once came.
Story.p2: In October 1891, the building owner, Mr. J. F. Tomaschek, filed a permit with the Prague magistrate. He had a clear vision: he wanted to pour and sell wine right here. But he ran straight into the brick wall of Austro-Hungarian bureaucracy.
Story.p3a: The authorities demanded fees and exhausting conditions that were likely impossible to meet at the time. On a yellowed document from 1895, a brief, handwritten full stop closes the entire project:
Story.p4a: It took long decades before a proper toast was finally raised in this building. And even though today we don't pretend to be a classic wine bar, we pour craft beers, open wild pet-nats, and fill our tables with board games, we're certain of one thing.
Story.p4highlight: Mr. Tomaschek would have loved this little hideaway.
Story.epilogue: We simply finished what started in 1891. Just with better drinks — and without the imperial stamp.

Events.title: Wednesday quizzes and evenings full of games
Events.description: Separé is alive. The perfect base for competitive minds, lovers of good drinks, and strategists alike.

quiz.title: Pub Quizzes
quiz.desc: Sign up your team, order a few bottles of wine, and show what you know. Our quizzes are legendary — and seats go fast.

games.title: Board Games Anytime
games.desc: Over 30 games from quick party classics to deep strategies. Borrowing is always free.

tasting.title: Tastings & Vernissages
tasting.desc: Culture comes alive here regularly. Come taste and discover.

Contact.title: Find us in the courtyard
Contact.description: The entrance is right off the street. Just grab the handle and leave the city noise behind. In summer, we open a quiet garden terrace tucked away in our courtyard.
Contact.mapDescription: We're just a few steps from the busy Národní třída. Walk straight in from the street and leave the rest of the world outside. In summer, we'll seat you on our garden terrace hidden in the courtyard. Safely the quietest hideaway in Prague.
